transcript: Olá, este é um teste de transcrição de áudio para o gateway de inteligência artificial.
baseline_latency_note: Conservative placeholder — NOT a measured direct-integration number. Whisper transcription of a ~5s clip on a warm GPU is typically well under 4s, but the prior direct-integration latency for Chat Ifix has not been measured yet. The Phase 8 HUMAN-UAT MUST re-measure the real direct-integration latency for a clip this size and update this field before the +/-10% latency gate is meaningful. Until then the latency_within_10pct gate compares against this conservative estimate.
